title: Skybox at Home
description:
Yet another skybox mod, but it displays your customiezd 360° panoramic images with equirectangular projection.
No, we have skybox at home!
body: Yet another skybox mod, but it displays your customized 360° panoramic images with equirectangular projection. It doesn't replace the sky, it's a block with special rendering that you can use to cover windows or whatever. > Me: Mom can we have skybox? > > Mom: No, we have skybox at home > > Skybox at home: > ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A1FL34wX/images/cea48315da3f351318850ce0609727980426720b.png) Make your underground base more lively, or experience the sceneries around the globe. [](https://modfest.net/1.20)
